text: I feel a gentle sense of curiosity here, surrounded by the lively atmosphere of thoughtfully designed exhibition spaces. The glass partitions and bright, open room suggest a commitment to transparency and collaboration. Moving closer, the colorful wall celebrating research and development catches my attention, inviting me to ponder the interplay between human imagination and technology. The words and visuals stir a contemplative mood, making me aware of my place in the ongoing dialogue between creativity, science, and society.
